testcase.name: TC_CL_07_verifyNameMaxLengthValidation

failure.message: Incorrect validation message. FieldError: [] AlertError: [Client has been added successfully.] expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Incorrect validation message.
